title: 3D Blades & More
description: A personal project that aims to make a variety of the basic Minecraft weapons into my own 3D renditions!
body:
# About the pack #
Hi there! My name is Marcia, this is a texture pack featuring simple textured models made by myself for a project that I hope to expand upon later named "3D Blades and more"

This pack is my own project that I have set myself to make simple and unobtrusive weapon models that help bring the spirit of Minecraft to a new 3D level. This pack will be slowly updated to add things like axes, bows, crossbows and even some items like enderpearls and fireworks.

This is my most ombitious project yet, being done purely to test my ability as well as to have a personal resource pack of my own that can be used in the wider Minecraft world.

# Rules with the pack #
These models are not free to be taken, this is my pack with models made exclusively by me and my imagination. These models are free to be used as a texture pack in videos and such, however editing of this pack is not allowed. These models are not yours <3
